nodes.label: Food and Nutrition
nodes.description: Understanding food groups, healthy eating, and how our body digests food

nodes.label: Food Groups
nodes.description: Different types of food classified by the nutrients they provide

nodes.label: Energy-giving Foods
nodes.description: Carbohydrates and fats: rice, roti, bread, potatoes, ghee, oil

nodes.label: Body-building Foods
nodes.description: Proteins: dal, milk, paneer, eggs, fish, soybean

nodes.label: Protective Foods
nodes.description: Vitamins and minerals: fruits, vegetables, amla, spinach, carrots

nodes.label: Water and Roughage
nodes.description: Water keeps body hydrated; roughage from whole grains aids digestion

nodes.label: Healthy Eating
nodes.description: Eating the right food in the right amounts for good health

nodes.label: Balanced Diet
nodes.description: A meal with all food groups: roti, dal, sabzi, rice, salad, curd

nodes.label: Good Eating Habits
nodes.description: Wash hands, eat on time, chew well, eat fresh food, drink water

nodes.label: Avoiding Junk Food
nodes.description: Chips, cold drinks, and sweets have too much oil, sugar, and salt

nodes.label: Digestion
nodes.description: How our body breaks down food to use its nutrients

nodes.label: Mouth
nodes.description: Teeth chew food into small pieces; saliva starts breaking food down

nodes.label: Stomach
nodes.description: Digestive juices mix and break food into a thick paste

nodes.label: Small Intestine
nodes.description: Nutrients are absorbed into the blood and carried to the whole body

nodes.label: Large Intestine
nodes.description: Water is absorbed and leftover waste is removed from the body
